definition:
1. likely to make one stumble  or trip : metaphorically slippery, perilous, dangerous , Lat. lubricus, (Herdotus Historicus), etc.:—; σφαλερόν [ ἐστι], with infinitive, it is dangerous  to . ., (Plato Philosophus), etc. 
2.  σφάλλομαι); ready to fall, tottering, reeling, staggering , (Aeschulus Tragicus); σφ. σύμμαχοι (Demosthenes Orator) 
 (ML)
